zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hals於1439年出生在英國戴文黑福德時，他的父親Richard Hals31歲，母親Lady Joane Ashe26歲。他於1464年與Margery Latimer在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年6月21日在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hals于1439年出生在英国戴文黑福德时，他的父亲Richard Hals31岁，母亲Lady Joane Ashe26岁。他于1464年与Margery Latimer在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1488年6月21日在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hals
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hall , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hall
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, German, Norwegian, and Danish: from Middle English hall (Old English heall), Middle High German halle, Old Norse hǫll all meaning ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a hall or an occupational name for a servant employed at a hall. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, which in some parts of Germany and Austria in the Middle Ages also denoted a salt mine. Hall is one of the commonest and most widely distributed of English surnames, bearing witness to the importance of the hall as a feature of the medieval village. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century, and, according to MacLysaght, has become numerous in Ulster since the 17th century.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from hall ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), or a habitational name from a placename containing the element hall ‘rock’ (from Old Norse hallr).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

variants.name: Alls
meanings: English: variant of Halls with loss of initial H-.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hals was born in 1439, in Sherford, Devon, England, his father, Richard Hals, was 31 and his mother, Lady Joane Ashe, was 26. He married Margery Latimer in 1464, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 21 June 1488, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hals est né en 1439, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hals, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Joane Ashe, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margery Latimer en 1464, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1488, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hals 1439 in Sherford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hals 31 und seine Mutter Lady Joane Ashe 26. Er hat 1464 in Devon, England Margery Latimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 21. Juni 1488 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hals è nato il nel 1439 nel Sherford, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Hals, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joane Ashe, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margery Latimer nel 1464, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 21 giugno 1488, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Halsが1439年にイギリスデボンシェルフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Halsは31歳，母Lady Joane Asheは26歳であった。1464年にイギリスデボンでMargery Latimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1488年6月21日に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hals(이)가 1439년 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hals(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joane Ashe(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 데폰에서 Margery Latimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 6월 21일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hals nasceu em 1439, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hals, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joane Ashe, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Latimer em 1464, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 21 de junho de 1488, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hals родился в 1439 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hals было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joane Ashe, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Latimer в 1464 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 21 июня 1488 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hals nació en 1439, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hals, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Joane Ashe, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margery Latimer en 1464, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 21 de junio de 1488, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
